parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json;

const prompt = 'You are a Tier 3 SOC Analyst performing deep threat analysis.

CONTEXT:
- Alert was triggered by Wazuh SIEM
- Initial triage completed by Agent 1
- Determine threat intent and propose remediation

ALERT DATA:
- Rule: ' + (d.alertData.rule_description || 'N/A') + '
- Rule ID: ' + (d.alertData.rule_id || 'N/A') + '
- Severity: ' + d.alertData.severity + '/15
- Source IP: ' + d.alertData.source_ip + '
- Destination IP: ' + d.alertData.dest_ip + '
- Affected Host: ' + d.alertData.hostname + '
- MITRE ATT&CK: ' + (d.alertData.mitre_tactics || 'N/A') + '
- MITRE IDs: ' + (d.alertData.mitre_ids || 'N/A') + '
- Groups: ' + (d.alertData.groups || 'N/A') + '
- Timestamp: ' + d.alertData.timestamp + '
- Full Log: ' + (d.alertData.full_log?.substring(0, 1000) || 'N/A') + '

REQUIRED OUTPUT FORMAT (JSON ONLY):
{
  "threat_intent": "string",
  "blast_radius": {
    "affected_systems": ["array"],
    "scope": "low|medium|high|critical",
    "data_at_risk": ["array"]
  },
  "mitre_attack": {
    "primary_technique": "T####",
    "techniques": ["array"],
    "tactics": ["array"]
  },
  "remediation_options": [
    {
      "action": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "impact": "string",
      "confidence": 0.0-1.0
    }
  ],
  "recommended_action": "string",
  "confidence_score": 0.0-1.0,
  "inconclusive": boolean
}

CRITICAL: If confidence_score < 0.7, explicitly state: "Inconclusive: Requires manual forensic investigation."

Format: JSON only, no additional text.';

return { json: { prompt } };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3, maxOutputTokens: 2048 } } }}

={{ { ticket: { title: '[DEEP ANALYSIS] ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.rule_description, group: 'Users', priority: $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.priority, state: 'open', article: { body: $('Format Report').item.json.body, content_type: 'text/html' } } } }}
